en.title: Web Development in Krakow | Professional Web Solutions
en.description: Expert web development services in Krakow. We create stunning, responsive websites to help your business thrive in Poland's cultural hub.
en.h1: Powering Krakow's Tech & Innovation Ecosystem with Custom Code
en.p: Build your competitive edge in Krakow with AVPdev: blazing-fast Astro sites, scalable Next.js apps, and intelligent automation for your business.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Krakow
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Krakow's technology and innovation hub, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Krakow businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Krakow?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
